economic_notes: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Various commercial enterprises consolidated including grocery store, pharmacy, gas bar, entertainment centre. Economic development activities include Lagimodière East Phase 1, Lagimodière Gas Bar, Mars Sandhills Golf Course, cannabis and grocery store commercial opportunity readiness.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). 13 entities fully consolidated including B.O.N. Ltd., BON Development Corporation, BON Limited Partnership, BON Pharmacy Ltd., Brokenhead Community Store Ltd., Brokenhead Entertainment Centre, Brokenhead Grocery Ltd., BON Revenue Sharing - Children in Care, Brokenhead Ojibway Nation Gaming Commission, Brokenhead Ojibway Nation Housing Authority, Brokenhead Ojibway Nation Mom's Seed Home, Wavers of Brokenhead Ltd., and Baaskaandibewiziibii Trust. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness ($608,844) + temporary borrowings ($20,526) + accounts payable ($1,040,160) = $1,669,530. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,941,350) + Health Canada ($3,750,924) + CMHC ($276,620) = $8,968,894. OSR calculated as total revenue ($11,799,808) minus total government transfers ($8,968,894) = $2,830,914 (includes other revenue and partnership earnings net of unexpended funding transfer). COVID-19 related deferred funding noted. Summary of ISC and Other Funding schedules are unaudited.
